data.body: Implemented review_code (library/CLI rebar review-code/gated MCP review_code): diff-centric but agentic, deterministic reviewer selection (select_code_reviewers: code-quality always + applies_to matches), each reviewer runs as a pass, results merged by aggregate_findings (cluster->consensus->rank; findings carry agreement+reviewers). Added a code-quality reviewer + a lightweight repo orientation (#6 basic; full tree-sitter/PageRank repo-map left as a future enhancement). Offline tests cover aggregation clustering/ranking, reviewer-selection rules, and end-to-end via FakeRunner.
